pi_items.source: Task instructions and export_result.sh explicitly require this QTH name.
Task instructions and verifier require 38.504. External search confirms Railroad Valley RadCaTS is near 38.497N.
Task instructions and verifier require -115.694 (115.694W). External search confirms Railroad Valley RadCaTS is near 115.690W.
Task instructions and verifier require 1435. External search confirms Railroad Valley is at 1,435 meters altitude.
Task instructions and export_result.sh explicitly require this module name.
Task instructions require SUOMI NPP, FENGYUN 3A, and FENGYUN 3B. Analyzing weather.txt confirms these NORAD IDs map to those exact satellites.
Task instructions and verifier explicitly require global minimum elevation to be set to 15.
Task instructions and verifier explicitly require UTC time to be enabled globally.
Task instructions and verifier explicitly require the module layout to be list view (LAYOUT=1).

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly specify creating a QTH named 'Railroad_Valley' with coordinates 38.504N, -115.694W, and 1435m altitude, which corresponds to the real-world Railroad Valley RadCaTS calibration site in Nevada. The agent must create a module named 'Vicarious_Cal' and add the NORAD IDs 37849, 32958, and 37214, which correspond to the SUOMI NPP, FENGYUN 3A, and FENGYUN 3B satellites present in the provided weather.txt TLE file. The agent must also set the global minimum elevation to 15 degrees, configure the layout to a List-only view, and set the application to display UTC time.
